title: API: `ContainersStatsAllLibpod` return differs from reference
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

A request to the `ContainersStatsAllLibpod` returns a different schema than described in the reference. 

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. start containers

2. query api `ContainersStatsAllLibpod` endpoint


**Describe the results you received:**
```
{
   "Error":null,
   "Stats":[
      {
         "AvgCPU":6.2906099970094654e-9,
         "ContainerID":"45bcf390e303a8d2732208bda1841a245e87dbfa342206121c34bdd8ca9f1b47",
         "Name":"stats_from_example_1",
         "PerCPU":null,
         "CPU":6.2906099970094654e-9,
         "CPUNano":103454000,
         "CPUSystemNano":82742,
         "DataPoints":1,
         "SystemNano":1644578189542535060,
         "MemUsage":483328,
         "MemLimit":16689455104,
         "MemPerc":0.002896008269821581,
         "NetInput":0,
         "NetOutput":0,
         "BlockInput":0,
         "BlockOutput":0,
         "PIDs":2,
         "UpTime":103454000,
         "Duration":103454000
      },
      {
         "AvgCPU":6.682625411112016e-9,
         "ContainerID":"b124a696a25844311e50bb6705adca62abd8814e9522d6887bf287514897aa95",
         "Name":"stats_from_example_2",
         "PerCPU":null,
         "CPU":6.682625411112016e-9,
         "CPUNano":109901000,
         "CPUSystemNano":84712,
         "DataPoints":1,
         "SystemNano":1644578189542903482,
         "MemUsage":487424,
         "MemLimit":16689455104,
         "MemPerc":0.002920550712786171,
         "NetInput":0,
         "NetOutput":0,
         "BlockInput":0,
         "BlockOutput":0,
         "PIDs":2,
         "UpTime":109901000,
         "Duration":109901000
      }
   ]
}
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
The schema described here: https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=v3.4#operation/ContainersStatsAllLibpod

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

***Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.4.4
API Version:  3.4.4
Go Version:   go1.16.8
Built:        Wed Dec  8 22:45:07 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

@zhangguanzhang: Closing this issue.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/13212#issuecomment-1066312247):

>duplicate issue: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/13213
>/close


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
